SEARCH
Package model

Interface BookDAO

All Known Implementing Classes:
DBImplementationBook
public interface BookDAO
Data Access Object interface for managing Book entities.
Author:
Iker

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    createBooking(Book booking)
    Creates a new booking in the underlying database.
    boolean
    deleteBooking(String idClient, int codCruise, Date startDate)
    Deletes an existing booking based on multiple primary keys.
    List<Book>
    getAllBookings()
    Retrieves a list of all current bookings in the database.
    String
    updateBooking(Book oldBooking, Book newBooking)
    Updates an existing booking by replacing it with a new booking structure.

  • Method Details

    • createBooking

      boolean createBooking(Book booking)
      Creates a new booking in the underlying database.
      Parameters:
      booking - The booking object to persist.
      Returns:
      true if successful, false otherwise.

    • deleteBooking

      boolean deleteBooking(String idClient, int codCruise, Date startDate)
      Deletes an existing booking based on multiple primary keys.
      Parameters:
      idClient - The client ID associated with the booking.
      codCruise - The cruise code.
      startDate - The start date of the booking.
      Returns:
      true if deletion is successful, false otherwise.

    • getAllBookings

      List<Book> getAllBookings()
      Retrieves a list of all current bookings in the database.
      Returns:
      a List containing Book objects.

    • updateBooking

      String updateBooking(Book oldBooking, Book newBooking)
      Updates an existing booking by replacing it with a new booking structure.
      Parameters:
      oldBooking - The current booking data to be updated.
      newBooking - The updated booking data.
      Returns:
      true if update is successful, false otherwise.
